description: A cloud-based invoicing application designed specifically for freelancers to create, send, and manage professional invoices. The app helps freelancers track payments, manage client information, and generate financial reports. It simplifies billing workflows and ensures timely payments through automated reminders and payment tracking.
features: Client database with contact and billing information
Invoice creation with customizable templates and branding
Automated invoice numbering and tax calculations
Multiple payment gateway integrations (Stripe, PayPal, etc.)
Payment tracking with status indicators (paid, pending, overdue)
Invoice PDF generation and email delivery
userFlows: User signs up and creates account
User adds client information to database
User creates new invoice with line items and taxes
User sends invoice to client via email
Client receives invoice and makes payment
User tracks payment status in dashboard
User sets up recurring invoices for regular clients
User exports data for accounting purposes
constraints: Must be fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop
Must comply with GDPR and data privacy regulations
Must ensure secure payment processing with PCI compliance
Must provide offline invoice creation capability
Must maintain data backup and recovery systems
Must offer intuitive user interface suitable for non-technical users
